untranslatable_reason: Signal requires filtering by institutional ownership percentage and analyst coverage, which are NOT available in the allowed indicator set. These are fundamental/reference data fields (institutional_ownership_pct, analyst_coverage) that cannot be derived from price/volume/technical indicators. Additionally, the signal conditions reference exchange type (OTC vs micro-exchange) which is also metadata not available as a technical indicator.
translation_notes: Translated only the quantifiable market-data conditions: average daily volume > 100K shares mapped to volume indicator, and market cap < $2B approximated as close < 2000 (as a proxy, though market cap is not directly calculable from close price alone). The core thesis about reduced institutional competition and increased retail participation cannot be mechanically expressed without access to institutional ownership and analyst coverage data sources outside the technical indicator framework.
